# SquareLibrary

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="SquareLibrary icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="SquareLibrary" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;rect height=&quot;18&quot; rx=&quot;2&quot; width=&quot;18&quot; ## Tags
books, reading, written, authors, stories, fiction, novels, information, knowledge, education, high school, university, college, academy, learning, study, research, collection, vinyl, records, albums, music, package

## Categories
text, photography, multimedia, navigation, development

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/square-library)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquareLibrary;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquareLibrary { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
